name: grave
hints: Inside a grave! There's a gold coin treasure and a purple worm.
GET COIN for the Gold Coin treasure. GET WORM for the purple worm.
The worm may be useful as bait or for other purposes.
GET COIN and GET WORM. U=Boot Hill (20).
notes: Inside a grave. Gold Coin treasure and purple worm (may be useful). U=Boot Hill (20).
